Q01.question: ¿Cuál es el objeto de la Ley 20.850?

rag.brief_justification: Excellent; correctly cites Art 1 and defines the financial protection system for high-cost treatments.

grail_local.brief_justification: Correct answer but verbose; no specific article citation; adds some interpretation beyond the text.

grail_local_reranked.brief_justification: Best response; mentions Art 19, Ricarte Soto name origin, and the Fund structure.

grail_global.brief_justification: Similar to local; good but more generic, lacks specific article references.

Q02.question: ¿Cuántos miembros tiene la Comisión de Recomendación Priorizada y quién la preside?

rag.brief_justification: Perfect; correctly identifies 12 members, Subsecretario as president, cites Art 8.

grail_local.brief_justification: Correct composition and presidency but no article citation.

grail_local_reranked.brief_justification: Same quality as local; correct facts without specific citation.

grail_global.brief_justification: Total miss; claims 'no information available' despite it being clearly in the corpus.

Q03.question: ¿Cada cuántos años se fija el umbral nacional de costo para determinar si un diagnóstico o tratamiento es de alto costo?

rag.brief_justification: Perfect; correctly states every 3 years, cites Art 6.

grail_local.brief_justification: Incorrect; states 'every year' instead of every 3 years.

grail_local_reranked.brief_justification: Incorrect; claims the period is 'not specified' when it is clearly Art 6.

grail_global.brief_justification: Incorrect; claims information 'not found' in the corpus.

Q04.question: ¿Cuál es el plazo de prescripción de las infracciones y sanciones del Título IV (obligatoriedad del otorgamiento) de la Ley 20.850?

rag.brief_justification: States information not available; fails to locate the 2-year prescription period.

grail_local.brief_justification: Claims 'not specified'; mentions wrong prescription concepts unrelated to the actual provision.

grail_local_reranked.brief_justification: Same failure; unable to locate the specific prescription period.

grail_global.brief_justification: Claims information not found in the corpus.

Q05.question: ¿Qué datos mínimos debe registrar un prestador de salud por cada beneficiario de la Ley 20.850 según el Decreto 54?

rag.brief_justification: Perfect; lists all 8 minimum data items from Art 8 of Decreto 54.

grail_local.brief_justification: Vague; mentions ficha clinica concept but does not enumerate the 8 specific data items.

grail_local_reranked.brief_justification: Same issue; provides generic data categories instead of the specific 8 items from Art 8.

grail_global.brief_justification: Claims data items are 'not specified' in the corpus.

Q06.question: ¿Cuáles son las condiciones copulativas que debe cumplir un diagnóstico o tratamiento para ser incorporado al decreto de alto costo?

rag.brief_justification: Perfect; lists all 4 copulative conditions from Art 5.

grail_local.brief_justification: Identifies the threshold and evaluation requirements but does not enumerate the exact 4 conditions.

grail_local_reranked.brief_justification: Only mentions the cost threshold; misses 3 of the 4 copulative conditions.

grail_global.brief_justification: Claims conditions are 'not specified' in the corpus.

Q07.question: Describe el proceso completo desde que se inicia la evaluación científica de un tratamiento hasta la decisión final de incorporarlo al Sistema de Protección Financiera.

rag.brief_justification: Empty response.

grail_local.brief_justification: Good description covering Arts 7-9 process with correct sequential steps.

grail_local_reranked.brief_justification: Excellent; presents 6 clear steps from evaluation to decree publication.

grail_global.brief_justification: Good structure but adds fabricated details like a specific '5 steps' framework not in the law.

Q08.question: ¿Qué ocurre con la protección financiera cuando un paciente en urgencia vital es atendido fuera de la Red de Prestadores?

rag.brief_justification: Excellent; identifies 3 scenarios for emergency care outside network, cites Art 3.

grail_local.brief_justification: Claims 'no specific mechanism found' despite the provision existing in Art 3.

grail_local_reranked.brief_justification: Partial; correctly mentions protection is maintained during hospitalization but misses full detail.

grail_global.brief_justification: Claims the emergency provision is 'not detailed' in the corpus.

Q09.question: ¿Qué criterios se usan para elaborar la propuesta de Garantías Explícitas en Salud?

rag.brief_justification: Excellent; identifies epidemiological studies, cost-effectiveness analysis, cites Arts 13-14.

grail_local.brief_justification: Empty response.

grail_local_reranked.brief_justification: Partial; mentions licitacion and consejo but not the specific elaboration criteria from Arts 13-14.

grail_global.brief_justification: Claims criteria are 'not detailed' in the corpus.

Q10.question: ¿Cómo se financia el Fondo para Diagnósticos y Tratamientos de Alto Costo?  Enumera todas las fuentes.

rag.brief_justification: Perfect; lists all 4 financing sources from Art 20.

grail_local.brief_justification: Mentions Tesoro Publico and donations but adds fabricated sources; misses cooperacion internacional.

grail_local_reranked.brief_justification: Similar issues; incomplete enumeration with some inaccurate additions.

grail_global.brief_justification: Only identifies 2 of the 4 financing sources.

Q11.question: ¿Qué relación existe entre la Ley Ricarte Soto (20.850) y las Garantías Explícitas en Salud de la Ley 19.966?

rag.brief_justification: Truncated response; starts well citing Art 1 but cuts off before completing the analysis.

grail_local.brief_justification: Good synthesis of how the two laws complement each other in the health protection framework.

grail_local_reranked.brief_justification: Good; mentions Art 4 and Art 13 cross-references between the laws.

grail_global.brief_justification: Similar quality; captures the complementary relationship effectively.
